sections.companySkillsHint: Optional skills from the company library. Built-in Paperclip runtime skills are added automatically.

errors.opencodeModelRequired: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.

empty.noCompany: Select a company to view projects.

alert.leftProject: You left this project. It no longer appears in your sidebar.

alert.primaryWorkspace: This is the project’s primary codebase workspace.

config.description: Configure the concrete workspace Paperclip attaches to this project. These values drive per-workspace checkout behavior, default runtime services for child execution workspaces, and let you override setup or cleanup commands when one workspace needs special handling.

fields.setupCommandHint: Runs when this workspace needs custom bootstrap
fields.cleanupCommandHint: Runs before project-level execution workspace teardown
fields.advancedRuntimeHint: Paperclip derives Services and Jobs from this JSON. Prefer editing named commands first; use raw JSON for advanced lifecycle, port, readiness, or environment settings.
fields.workspaceCommandsHint: Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it. Legacy `services` arrays still work, but `commands` supports both services and jobs.

commands.title: Services and jobs
commands.label: Workspace commands
commands.description: Long-running services stay supervised here, while one-shot jobs run on demand against this workspace. Execution workspaces inherit this config unless they override it.
commands.noServices: No services have been started for this workspace yet.
commands.noCommandsConfig: No workspace command config is defined for this workspace yet.
commands.noJobs: No one-shot jobs are configured for this workspace yet.
commands.disabledHint: Project workspaces need a working directory before local commands can run, and services also need runtime config.

empty.notFound: Workspace not found for this project.

sourceTypes.localGitDesc: A local path Paperclip can use directly.
sourceTypes.nonGitDesc: A local folder without git semantics.
sourceTypes.remoteGitDesc: A repo URL with optional refs and local checkout.
sourceTypes.remoteManagedDesc: A hosted workspace tracked by external reference.

validation.localPathAbsolute: Local workspace path must be absolute.
validation.validRepoUrl: Repo URL must be a valid URL.
validation.atLeastOnePath: Workspace requires at least one local path or repo URL.
validation.remoteManagedRequiresRef: Remote-managed workspaces require a remote workspace ref or repo URL.
validation.jsonMustBeObject: Workspace commands JSON must be a JSON object.

runtime.serviceStopped: Workspace service stopped. Issue execution is not paused.
runtime.serviceRestarted: Workspace service restarted. Issue execution is not paused.

routines.title: Routines
routines.description: Recurring work definitions that materialize into auditable execution issues.

empty.noCompany: Select a company to view routines.
empty.noRoutines: No routines yet. Use Create routine to define the first recurring workflow.

composer.title: New routine
composer.description: Define the recurring work first. Default project and agent are optional for draft routines.

sections.advancedHint: Keep policy controls secondary to the work definition.

footer.hint: After creation, Paperclip takes you straight to trigger setup. Draft routines stay paused until you add a default agent.

routineCreatedBody.assignee: Add the first trigger to turn it into a live workflow.
routineCreatedBody.draft: Draft saved. Add a default agent before enabling automation.

toasts.routineFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
toasts.runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
toasts.defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.

concurrency.coalesceIfActive: If a run is already active, keep just one follow-up run queued.
concurrency.alwaysEnqueue: Queue every trigger occurrence, even if the routine is already running.
concurrency.skipIfActive: Drop new trigger occurrences while a run is still active.

catchUp.skipMissed: Ignore windows that were missed while the scheduler or routine was paused.
catchUp.enqueueMissedWithCap: Catch up missed schedule windows in capped batches after recovery.

status.draftWarning: Default agent required. This routine can stay as a draft and still run manually, but automation stays paused until you assign a default agent.

secrets.description: Routine secrets apply to every issue this routine creates. They override matching keys in project and agent env. PAPERCLIP_* variables are reserved.

conflict.title: Out of date
conflict.description: This routine changed while you were editing. Reload to merge the latest revision before saving again.
conflict.failedBody: Someone else updated this routine. Reload to see the latest revision.

secretMessage.saveNow: Save this now. Paperclip will not show the secret value again.

toasts.triggerSavedBody: The routine cadence update was saved.
toasts.updateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the routine.
toasts.triggerUpdateFailedBody: Paperclip could not update the trigger.
toasts.triggerDeleteFailedBody: Paperclip could not delete the trigger.
toasts.rotateFailedBody: Paperclip could not rotate the webhook secret.
toasts.runFailedBody: Paperclip could not start the routine run.
toasts.saveFailedBody: Paperclip could not save the routine.
toasts.defaultAgentRequiredBody: Set a default agent before enabling routine automation.

secrets.title: Secrets

empty.noCompany: Select a company to manage secrets.
empty.noSecrets: No secrets yet. Create your first managed secret or link an external reference.

dialog.title: Create secret
dialog.description: Choose whether Paperclip should own future provider writes, or only resolve an existing provider reference at runtime.

create.descriptionPlaceholder: What is this secret used for? (no values)
create.managedHint: Paperclip-managed secrets are created in the selected provider and future rotations write a new provider version through Paperclip.
create.externalHint: Existing provider secrets are resolve-only in Paperclip. Rotate the value in the provider, then update this reference only if the path, ARN, or version changes.
create.deploymentDefaultHint: Existing deployment-level provider settings stay available for backwards compatibility.

blockReason.notConfigured: is not configured in this deployment.
blockReason.noManaged: does not support Paperclip-managed secret values.
blockReason.noExternal: does not support linked external references.

modeDescription.managed: Paperclip owns create and rotation writes for this provider secret. Paperclip never re-displays stored values.
modeDescription.external: Paperclip resolves this provider reference but does not rotate the provider value. Paperclip never re-displays stored values.

usage.noBindings: No active bindings. Add this secret in agent, project, environment, or plugin config to start using it.

events.noEvents: No access events recorded yet. Each runtime resolution writes a redacted entry here.

description.managed: Creates a new provider-backed version. Consumers pinned to latest pick up the new value on the next run.
description.external: Creates a new Paperclip metadata version that points at an existing provider secret. Paperclip does not write a new provider value.

rotate.deploymentDefaultHint: Rotating with the deployment default preserves current fallback behavior.
rotate.refHint: Rotate the actual value in the provider before changing this Paperclip reference.

delete.title: Delete secret
delete.warning: Active bindings will fail until you remap them.

howToUse.title: Use secrets by binding them to runtime environment variables.
howToUse.step1: Create or link a secret here, then open an agent’s Environment variables or a project’s Env field. Add the env key the process expects, for example
howToUse.step2: and select the stored secret version.
howToUse.step3: Paperclip resolves the value server-side when the run starts and injects it as that env var. Project env applies to every issue in the project and overrides agent env on matching keys.

vaults.title: Provider vaults
vaults.noVaults: No company-specific vaults yet. Secrets can still use the deployment default provider settings.

createDialog.title: Create provider vault
createDialog.description: Save only non-sensitive routing metadata. Credentials stay in the runtime environment or provider identity.

vaults.comingSoonBlock: This provider vault is saved as draft metadata only.
vaults.healthFailed: This provider vault health check failed.

removeDialog.title: Remove provider vault
removeDialog.awsNote: This does not delete the remote AWS Secrets Manager vault, secrets, or any AWS data.
removeDialog.genericNote: This does not delete any remote provider data.
removeDialog.bindingsNote: Secrets using this vault will lose the vault association until you assign another one.

discovery.description: Uses the current draft routing fields to inspect AWS Secrets Manager metadata. Values are not read.
discovery.enterRegion: Enter an AWS region before discovery.
discovery.noCandidates: No AWS vault metadata candidates found. Manual entry is still available.
discovery.noNamespace: No stable namespace or prefix detected

vaults.backupReminder: I understand backup and restore require both the database metadata and the local encrypted master key file.

secrets.gcpComingSoon: This provider can save draft routing metadata, but runtime writes and resolution stay disabled until the provider module is implemented and reviewed.

search.title: Search
search.placeholder: Search issues, comments, documents, agents, projects…

initial.title: Type to search company memory.
initial.description: Issues, comments, plan documents, agents, projects — same surface, ranked by relevance.
initial.tip1Desc: to jump straight to an issue.
initial.tip2: wrap a phrase in quotes to match the exact sequence.
initial.tip3Label: reopens the command palette pre-seeded with your current query.

error.title: Couldn’t run that search
error.hint: Your input and filters are still here, so you can retry or fall back to the Issues filter.

empty.title: No results for
empty.description: We couldn’t find a match in
empty.descriptionEnd: Try widening the scope or rephrasing your query.
empty.tip1: Try fewer tokens or a single distinctive term.

source.overrides: This execution workspace currently overrides the project workspace runtime config.

source.none: No runtime config is currently defined on this execution workspace or its project workspace.

runtime.advancedHint: Override the inherited workspace command model only when this execution workspace truly needs different service or job behavior.

instanceSettings.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
instanceSettings.empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

activity.selectCompany: Select a company to view activity.

approvalDetail.approvedBannerSubtext: Requesting agent was notified to review this approval and linked issues.
approvalDetail.linkedIssuesHint: Linked issues remain open until the requesting agent follows up and closes them.
approvalDetail.resolveBudgetStop: Resolve this budget stop from the budget controls on
approvalDetail.deleteDisapprovedAgentConfirm: Delete this disapproved agent? This cannot be undone.

companies.deleteCompanyConfirm: Delete this company and all its data? This cannot be undone.

companyAccess.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
companyAccess.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to manage company members.
companyAccess.membersDesc: Manage the people who can work in {name}. Members can collaborate across the company by default.
companyAccess.coreNotice: Core keeps this page focused on membership, invite approvals, and safe member removal.
companyAccess.instanceAdminNotice: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.
companyAccess.humansDesc: Manage human company memberships and status here.
companyAccess.pendingJoinsDesc: Review pending join requests before they become active company members.
companyAccess.noMembersFound: No user memberships found for this company yet.
companyAccess.editMemberDesc: Update company role and membership status for {name}.
companyAccess.removeMemberDesc: Archive {name} and move active assignments before hiding this user from assignment fields.
companyAccess.advancedPermissionsDesc: Advanced access, scoped assignment, and explicit grant controls are provided by installed company settings extensions.
companyAccess.corePAPDesc: Core Paperclip keeps enforcing company boundaries and any existing restrictive policy data, but editing advanced permissions requires an installed extension.

companyEnvironments.selectCompany: Select a company to manage environments.
companyEnvironments.environmentsDisabled: Enable Environments in instance experimental settings to manage company execution targets.
companyEnvironments.title: Company Environments
companyEnvironments.description: Define reusable execution targets for projects, issue workspaces, and remote-capable adapters.
companyEnvironments.supportNotice: Environment choices use the same adapter support matrix as agent defaults.
companyEnvironments.sandboxNote: These are not adapter types. They back the Sandbox driver for adapters that support sandbox execution.
companyEnvironments.noEnvironments: No environments saved for this company yet.
companyEnvironments.name: Name
companyEnvironments.nameHint: Operator-facing name for this execution target.
companyEnvironments.descriptionHint: Optional note about what this machine is for.
companyEnvironments.driverHint: Local runs on this host. SSH stores a remote machine target. Sandbox stores plugin-backed provider config on the shared environment seam.
companyEnvironments.hostHint: DNS name or IP address for the remote machine.
companyEnvironments.remoteWorkspacePathHint: Absolute path that Paperclip will verify during SSH connection tests.
companyEnvironments.privateKeyHint: Optional PEM private key. Leave blank to rely on the server's SSH agent or default keychain.
companyEnvironments.knownHostsHint: Optional known_hosts block used when strict host key checking is enabled.
companyEnvironments.strictHostKeyCheckingHint: Keep this on unless you deliberately want probe-time host key acceptance disabled.
companyEnvironments.providerHint: Installed run-capable sandbox provider plugins appear here.
companyEnvironments.providerNoConfig: This provider does not declare additional configuration fields.

companyExport.selectFile: Select a file to preview its contents.

companyImport.selectCompany: Select a company to import into.
companyImport.selectFile: Select a file to preview its contents.
companyImport.importSourceHint: Choose a GitHub repo or upload a local Paperclip zip package.
companyImport.githubUrlHint: Repo tree path or blob URL to COMPANY.md (e.g. github.com/owner/repo/tree/main/company).
companyImport.targetHint: Import into this company or create a new one.
companyImport.newCompanyNameHint: Optional override. Leave blank to use the package name.
companyImport.collisionStrategyHint: Board imports can rename, skip, or replace matching company content.
companyImport.localZipHelp: Upload a .zip exported directly from Paperclip. Re-zipped archives created by Finder, Explorer, or other zip tools may not import correctly.

companyInvites.selectCompany: Select a company to manage invites.
companyInvites.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to manage company invites.
companyInvites.title: Company Invites
companyInvites.description: Invite people to request access to this company. New invite links are copied to your clipboard when they are generated.
companyInvites.invitePersonDesc: Generate a human invite link and choose the default access it should request.
companyInvites.viewerDesc: Can view company work and follow along.
companyInvites.operatorDesc: Recommended for people who need to help run work without managing access.
companyInvites.adminDesc: Recommended for operators who need to invite people, create agents, and approve joins.
companyInvites.adminGets: Can create agents, invite users, assign tasks, and approve join requests.
companyInvites.ownerDesc: Full company access, including membership management.
companyInvites.ownerGets: Everything in Admin, plus managing members.
companyInvites.inviteNote: Each invite link is single-use. Human invitees get the selected role immediately after sign-in; agent invites still create a join request for approval.
companyInvites.inviteHistoryHint: Invite history below keeps the audit trail.
companyInvites.latestInviteUrlHint: This URL includes the current Paperclip domain returned by the server.
companyInvites.inviteHistoryDesc: Review invite status, audience, inviter, and any linked join request.
companyInvites.noInvitesCreated: No invites have been created for this company yet.

companySettings.noCompany: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companySettings.title: Company Settings
companySettings.companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
companySettings.descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
companySettings.logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
companySettings.brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
companySettings.attachmentSizeError: Enter a whole number from 1 to {max}.
companySettings.requireBoardApproval: Require board approval for new hires
companySettings.requireBoardApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
companySettings.packagesMoved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.
companySettings.archiveDesc: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.

companySkills.selectCompany: Select a company to manage skills.
companySkills.sourceHint: Paste a local path, GitHub URL, or skills.sh command into the field first.
companySkills.selectCatalogSkill: Select a catalog skill to inspect.

companySkills.noAgentsSupportSkills: No agents in this company support skills yet.
companySkills.noCatalogMatch: No catalog skills match this filter.
companySkills.removeSkillDialog: Remove this skill from the company library. If any agents still use it, removal will be blocked until it is detached.
companySkills.detachHint: Detach this skill from all agents to enable removal.

costs.selectCompany: Select a company to view costs.
costs.title: Costs
costs.subtitle: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costs.selectDate: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.inferenceLedgerDesc: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
costs.budgetConsumed: of monthly budget consumed in this range.
costs.financeLedgerDesc: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.netSubtitle: Debit minus credit for the selected period
costs.estimatedSubtitle: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
costs.byAgentDesc: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.byProjectDesc: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costs.budgetControlDesc: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects.
costs.activeIncidentsSubtitle: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.pendingApprovalsSubtitle: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.resolveHardStops: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
costs.agentBudgetsDesc: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
costs.projectBudgetsDesc: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
costs.noBudgetPolicies: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
costs.noBillableEvents: No billable events in this period.
costs.noCostInPeriod: No cost events in this period.
costs.byBillerDesc: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
costs.noFinanceHint: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.

issueDetail.pausedLeafDesc: Issue execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake the assignee for triage.
issueDetail.subtreePauseDesc: Root and descendant execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake assignees for triage.
issueDetail.pausedByAncestor: This issue is paused by ancestor
issueDetail.resumeFromRoot: Resume from the root issue to deliver deferred work.
issueDetail.blockedByParkedWorkDesc: Blocked by parked work — at least one assigned blocker is in backlog and will not wake its assignee.
issueDetail.cancelWarning: Cancelling a subtree is destructive. Non-terminal issues will be marked cancelled, and running or queued work will be interrupted where possible.
issueDetail.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this subtree control is being applied...
issueDetail.noAgentsToWake: No assigned agents are eligible to wake from this preview.
issueDetail.wakeAfterOperation: Wake assigned agents after this operation completes.
issueDetail.confirmCancel: I understand this will cancel {count} issues.
issueDetail.thisIssueIsInPlanMode: This issue is in planning mode.
issueDetail.thisTaskIsAProductivityReview: This task is a productivity review.

subtitle.signIn: Use your email and password to access this instance.
subtitle.createAccount: Create an account for this instance. Email confirmation is not required in v1.

boardClaim.claimedDesc: This instance is now linked to your authenticated user.
boardClaim.signInRequiredDesc: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to claim Board ownership.
boardClaim.claimOwnershipDesc: This will promote your user to instance admin and migrate company ownership access from local trusted mode.

cliAuth.approvedDesc: The Paperclip CLI can now finish authentication on the requesting machine.
cliAuth.expiredDesc: Start the CLI auth flow again from your terminal to generate a new approval request.
cliAuth.signInRequiredDesc: Sign in or create an account, then return to this page to approve the CLI access request.
cliAuth.approveDesc: A local Paperclip CLI process is requesting board access to this instance.
cliAuth.noApprovePermission: This challenge requires instance-admin access. Sign in with an instance admin account to approve it.

disabled.title: Cloud upstream
disabled.description: Cloud sync is disabled. Enable it in
disabled.showTools: to show upstream connection and push tools.

cloudUpstream.description: Push {company} into a Paperclip Cloud stack. Automations stay paused until activation.

conflicts.label: Conflicts
conflicts.none: No target conflicts detected for this preview.

notices.pushSucceeded: Push run completed. Review activation before unpausing automations.
notices.pushFailed: Push run failed. Review the run events and retry after correcting the issue.

errors.noPendingConnection: No pending cloud upstream connection was found. Start the connection again.
errors.notApproved: Cloud upstream connection was not approved:
errors.previewTooLarge: Local company is too large to preview as a single request. Click Push to continue (the Push step uploads in chunks), or see the docs for chunked-preview options.

previewHint.largeCompany: Building manifest... {s}s. Large companies can take up to a minute.
previewHint.papScale: Still building manifest... {s}s. PAP-scale companies routinely take ~60s.

activationCategories.agentsDetail: Confirm cloud secrets and adapter credentials before unpausing imported agents.
activationCategories.routinesDetail: Review schedules and trigger settings before enabling imported routines.
activationCategories.monitorsDetail: Activate after the target stack has been smoke tested.

dashboardLive.title: Live agent runs
dashboardLive.description: Active runs first, followed by the most recent completed runs.
dashboardLive.selectCompany: Select a company to view live runs.
dashboardLive.createCompany: Create a company to view live runs.
dashboardLive.noActiveRuns: No active or recent agent runs.

instanceAccess.title: Instance Access
instanceAccess.description: Search users, manage instance-admin status, and control which companies they can access.
instanceAccess.permissionDenied: Instance admin access is required to manage users.
instanceAccess.selectUser: Select a user to inspect instance access.
instanceAccess.companyAccessDesc: Toggle company membership for this user. New access defaults to an active operator membership.

instanceExperimental.title: Experimental
instanceExperimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.

sections.enableEnvironmentsDesc: Show environment management in company settings and allow project and agent environment assignment controls.
sections.enableIsolatedWorkspacesDesc: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.
sections.issuePlanDecompositionDesc: Show accepted-plan decomposition history on issue detail pages. Intended for debugging and validating subtask creation behavior while the presentation is still being refined.
sections.cloudSyncDesc: Show local Paperclip Cloud upstream connection, preview, push, retry, and activation review surfaces. Saved connections and run history are preserved when this is disabled.
sections.autoRestartDevServerDesc: In pnpm dev:once, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
sections.autoRecoveryDesc: Let the heartbeat scheduler create recovery issues for issue dependency chains found inside the configured lookback window.

recovery.noTasks: No recovery tasks would be created right now. Auto-recovery can still run for future liveness incidents in this window.
recovery.outsideLookback: {count} current {finding} outside the configured lookback and will not be touched.
recovery.lookbackError: Lookback hours must be a whole number from 1 to 720.

instanceGeneral.title: General
instanceGeneral.description: Configure instance-wide preferences including log display, keyboard shortcuts, backup retention, and data sharing.

sections.deploymentLocalDesc: Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
sections.deploymentPublicDesc: Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
sections.deploymentPrivateDesc: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
sections.censorUsernameDesc: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
sections.keyboardShortcutsDesc: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
sections.backupRetentionDesc: Configure how long automatic database backups are retained. Backups run roughly every hour and are compressed with gzip. Within the daily window all backups are kept; beyond that, one backup per week and one per month are preserved.
sections.aiFeedbackDesc: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Paperclip Labs. Votes are always saved locally.
sections.signOutDesc: Sign out of this Paperclip instance. You will be redirected to the login page.

feedback.noDefault: No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
feedback.dontAllowDesc: Keep voted AI outputs locally only.
feedback.resetNote: To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.

inviteLanding.notAvailableDesc: This invite may be expired, revoked, or already used.
inviteLanding.awaitingApproval: Your request is still awaiting approval.
inviteLanding.refreshAfter: Refresh this page after you've been approved — you'll be redirected automatically.
inviteLanding.invitedBanner: You've been invited to join Paperclip
inviteLanding.reviewDetails: Review the invite details, then submit the agent information below to start the join request.
inviteLanding.createAccountFirst: Create your Paperclip account first. If you already have one, switch to sign in and continue the invite with the same email.
inviteLanding.accountReady: Your account is ready. Review the invite details, then accept it to continue.
inviteLanding.submitAgentDesc: This invite will create an approval request for a new agent in {company}.
inviteLanding.createAccountDesc: Start with a Paperclip account. After that, you'll come right back here to accept the invite for {company}.
inviteLanding.signInDesc: Use the Paperclip account that already matches this invite. If you do not have one yet, switch back to create account.
inviteLanding.alreadySignedUp: Already signed up before? Use the existing-account option instead so the invite lands on the right Paperclip user.
inviteLanding.noAccountYet: No account yet? Switch back to create account so you can accept the invite with a new login.
inviteLanding.grantAccess: grant or complete your access to {company}
inviteLanding.notApproved: This join request was not approved.
inviteLanding.alreadyUsed: This invite has already been used.

auth.emailExists: An account already exists for {email}. Sign in below to continue with this invite.
auth.invalidCredentials: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
auth.checkBoth: That email and password did not match an existing Paperclip account. Check both fields, or create an account first if you are new here.
auth.accountMayExist: An account may already exist for {email}. Try signing in instead.

errors.fieldsRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.checkAccess: Checking your company access. Try again in a moment.
errors.alreadyMember: This account already belongs to the company.

alphaNotice.title: Plugins are alpha.
alphaNotice.description: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.

sections.noBundled: No bundled plugins were found in this checkout.

pluginSettings.author: Author

installDialog.title: Install External Adapter
installDialog.description: Add an adapter from npm or a local path. The adapter package must export
installDialog.pathHelp: Accepts Linux, WSL, and Windows paths. Windows paths are auto-converted.

alphaNotice.title: External adapters are alpha.
alphaNotice.description: The adapter plugin system is under active development. APIs and storage format may change. Use the power icon to hide adapters from agent menus without removing them.

sections.noExternalDesc: Install an adapter package to extend model support.

remove.title: Remove Adapter
remove.confirm: Are you sure you want to remove the {type} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
remove.npmCleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.

reinstall.title: Reinstall Adapter
reinstall.description: This will pull the latest version of {package} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.

agentConfig.titleDesc: Job title shown in the org chart.
agentConfig.roleDesc: Organizational role. Determines position and capabilities.
agentConfig.reportsToDesc: The agent this one reports to in the org hierarchy.
agentConfig.capabilitiesDesc: Describes what this agent can do. Shown in the org chart and used for task routing.
agentConfig.adapterTypeDesc: How this agent runs: local CLI (Claude/Codex/OpenCode), OpenClaw Gateway, spawned process, or generic HTTP webhook.
agentConfig.cwdDesc: Deprecated legacy working directory fallback for local adapters. Existing agents may still carry this value, but new configurations should use project workspaces instead.
agentConfig.promptTemplateDesc: Sent on every heartbeat. Keep this small and dynamic. Use it for current-task framing, not large static instructions. Supports {{ agent.id }}, {{ agent.name }}, {{ agent.role }} and other template variables.

accountingModelCard.title: Accounting model
accountingModelCard.description: Paperclip now separates request-level inference usage from account-level finance events. That keeps provider reporting honest when the biller is OpenRouter, Cloudflare, Bedrock, or another intermediary.
accountingModelCard.inferenceDescription: Request-scoped usage and billed runs from cost_events.
accountingModelCard.financeDescription: Account-level charges that are not one prompt-response pair.

bootstrapPendingPage.cliTitle: Prefer to finish setup from the host?
bootstrapPendingPage.cliInviteActive: A bootstrap invite is already active. Check your Paperclip startup logs for the first-admin URL, or run this command on the host to rotate it:
bootstrapPendingPage.cliNoInvite: Run this command on the host that runs Paperclip to print a one-time first-admin invite URL:
bootstrapPendingPage.claimedError: Someone else has already claimed this instance.
bootstrapPendingPage.claimedBody: Refresh to sign in, or ask the existing admin to invite you from Instance settings -> Access.
bootstrapPendingPage.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again to claim this instance.
bootstrapPendingPage.serverError: We couldn't reach the server. Try again in a moment.
bootstrapPendingPage.waitingAdmin: This Paperclip is waiting on its first admin
bootstrapPendingPage.waitingAdminDesc: This instance runs in invite-only mode. The operator must generate a one-time first-admin invite URL from the host. Once you have the link, open it from this browser to finish setup.
bootstrapPendingPage.publicModeNote: Browser-based claim is intentionally disabled in public mode so anyone on the network can't promote themselves.
bootstrapPendingPage.adminClaimedDesc: Setup is complete. Taking you to onboarding to create your first company...
bootstrapPendingPage.finishSetupDesc: No admin has claimed this instance yet. Sign in or create your Paperclip account to become the first admin from this browser.
bootstrapPendingPage.claimNowDesc: No admin has claimed this instance yet. Claim it now to become the first admin and start onboarding.

budgetIncidentCard.pausedProject: Project execution is paused. New work in this project will not start until you resolve the budget incident.
budgetIncidentCard.pausedScope: This scope is paused. New heartbeats will not start until you resolve the budget incident.

budgetPolicyCard.pausedProject: Execution is paused for this project until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budgetPolicyCard.pausedScope: Heartbeats are paused for this scope until the budget is raised or the incident is dismissed.
budgetPolicyCard.invalidAmount: Enter a valid non-negative dollar amount.

cloudAccessGate.noCompanyAccessDesc: This account is signed in, but it does not have an active company membership or instance-admin access on this Paperclip instance.
cloudAccessGate.noCompanyAccessHint: Use a company invite or sign in with an account that already belongs to this org.

issueColumns.statusDesc: Issue state chip on the left edge.
issueColumns.projectDesc: Linked project pill with its color.
issueColumns.workspaceDesc: Execution or project workspace used for the issue.

issueDocumentAnnotations.historicalDisabled: New comments are disabled while previewing a historical revision.
issueDocumentAnnotations.conflictDisabled: Resolve the document conflict before adding new comments.
issueDocumentAnnotations.draftDisabled: Save the draft to anchor new comments.
issueDocumentAnnotations.noRevisionDisabled: Document has no saved revision yet.

issueDocumentsSection.invalidKeyHint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.
issueDocumentsSection.keyAndBodyRequired: Document key and body are required
issueDocumentsSection.keyMustStart: Document key must start with a letter or number and use only lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _.
issueDocumentsSection.lockedForEdit: Document is locked. Unlock it before editing.
issueDocumentsSection.remoteChanged: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
issueDocumentsSection.saveBeforeView: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.
issueDocumentsSection.saveBeforeLock: Save or cancel local changes before changing the document lock.

issuePlanDecompositionsSection.title: Plan decomposition
issuePlanDecompositionsSection.reuseFingerprint: Repeat attempts with this fingerprint reuse this record instead of creating new children

issueRecoveryActionCard.missingDispositionDesc: This issue's run finished, but no next step was chosen.
issueRecoveryActionCard.strandedDesc: Paperclip retried this issue's last run and it still has no live execution path.
issueRecoveryActionCard.activeWatchdogDesc: The active run has been silent. Recovery is observing without interrupting it.
issueRecoveryActionCard.graphLivenessDesc: Paperclip detected this issue lost a live action path. A recovery owner needs to act.
issueRecoveryActionCard.tryAgainDesc: Dismiss recovery and return the source issue to todo.
issueRecoveryActionCard.markDoneDesc: Restore by recording the requested work as complete.
issueRecoveryActionCard.sendForReviewDesc: Hand off to a reviewer with a real review path.
issueRecoveryActionCard.falsePositiveDoneDesc: Dismiss recovery and mark the source issue complete.
issueRecoveryActionCard.falsePositiveReviewDesc: Dismiss recovery and send the source issue for review.

issueRelatedWorkPanel.referencesDesc: Other tasks this issue currently points at in its title, description, comments, or documents.
issueRelatedWorkPanel.noReferences: This issue does not reference any other tasks yet.
issueRelatedWorkPanel.referencedByDesc: Other tasks that currently point at this issue.
issueRelatedWorkPanel.notReferenced: No other tasks reference this issue yet.

issueRow.blockedByParked: Blocked by parked work — at least one assigned blocker is in backlog and will not wake its assignee.

issueRunLedger.advancedDesc: Run produced concrete evidence of progress.
issueRunLedger.planOnlyDesc: Run described future work without concrete action evidence.
issueRunLedger.blockedDesc: Run or issue declared a blocker.
issueRunLedger.needsFollowUpDesc: Run produced useful output but did not prove concrete progress.
issueRunLedger.checksAfterFinishDesc: Liveness is evaluated after the run finishes.
issueRunLedger.retryPendingDesc: Paperclip queued an automatic retry that has not started yet.
issueRunLedger.noLivenessDesc: This run has no persisted liveness classification.
